name: Sulfate Morphine
description: Opioid analgesic. Pese iderun irora ti o munadoko ṣugbọn o fa vasodilation ati hypotension -- lo pẹlu iṣọra ni mọnamọna ẹjẹ. Ketamine jẹ ayanfẹ ni awọn eto ija. Lo morphine nikan ni awọn alaisan iduroṣinṣin hemodynamically.
indications: Irora iwọntunwọnsi-si-irora ninu awọn alaisan iduroṣinṣin hemodynamically
Kii ṣe laini akọkọ ni TCCC - fẹ ketamine
dose: 2-4 mg IV / IO q4h PRN. Titrate si ipa. IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
contraindications: Ipalara ori pẹlu LOC ti o yipada (ẹlumọ)
warnings: O nfa vasodilation - le buru si mọnamọna ẹjẹ. Ṣe ayẹwo BP ṣaaju ati lẹhin.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV q2-4h PRN. Iwọn ẹyọkan ti o pọju 2mg IV ni ọmọ opioid-naive.
pediatric.note: Ṣe abojuto oṣuwọn atẹgun ni pẹkipẹki. Neonates ni o wa lalailopinpin kókó.

obstetric.note: Rekọja placenta. Ibanujẹ atẹgun ọmọ tuntun ṣee ṣe ti o ba fun ni laarin awọn wakati 2-4 ti ifijiṣẹ. Ṣe naloxone ṣetan fun ọmọ tuntun.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
